creator: mp39590@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 154097
patch

- update from 0.18.1 to 0.19

- add options to customize build (previously, if emacs was presented in system, elc files weren't installed; while here "option'ify" bash and zsh completions)

- mark as ignored for everything below 9.0 release - zlib 1.2.5 required, I didn't find any __FreeBSD_version defining this upgrade. 9.0 seem to be shipped with it by output of git log.
